title: STDIO, Streamable HTTP, Lifecycle, and Deployment · Skill Foundry
summary: Choose and configure a transport for local and remote MCP servers. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a local and remote transport deployment plan while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement newline-safe STDIO transport without logging protocol noise to standard output.
Implement remote Streamable HTTP with correct routing, content types, and transport security.
Handle startup, initialization, shutdown, timeout, and reconnect behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
